title: rosa canina f. andegavensis
intro: Rosa canina f. andegavensis, also known as the Dog Rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa canina plant native to the Mediterranean region and Western Europe. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina f. andegavensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in skincare products due to its high vitamin C content and antioxidant properties.
